title: The Crew Regroups at the Castle
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the crew regroups at the castle, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Regroups at the Castle. Luffy understands the meaning of Hiriluk’s flag and refuses to let Wapol treat it like a decoration. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The seas are full of proud men called Pirates! You should venture the seas one day too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm gonna start kicking their asses right now, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you want to protect that flag so much,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Sounds like he put out his back...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Not surprising considering how much he's running around with those injuries...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Mahahahaha! What're you hippos up to now!? Having fun beating each other up?

summary: This part highlights the crew regroups at the castle and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
